data.title: Pre-existing test failures on master: 7 failures in buttons/footer/navigation/neighborhood suites

data.body: Discovered during FRAC-198 review: pnpm test has 7 pre-existing failures in 4 files (buttons, footer, navigation, neighborhood) — identical on master, unrelated to the docs change. Needs investigation; reviewer did not diagnose root cause.

REVIEW — PASS (cold review, agent:claude-opus-4-reviewer).

Scope: git diff master...HEAD touches ONLY src/__tests__/* (buttons, footer, navigation, neighborhood) + the plan file. NO component source changed — confirmed.

Per-failure intent verification (no assertion weakened/deleted):
#1 buttons aria-hidden 4->5: button.tsx:143-171 = 1 grain span + 4 Mandelbrot corner spans, ALL aria-hidden. 5 is correct; assertion still meaningfully counts decorative [aria-hidden] elements.
#2 asChild CTA bg: button.tsx:52 default variant rest fill IS bg-[var(--accent,currentColor)] (FRAC-215 rename). Sibling assertions (inline-flex line, border-color line) retained — not gutted.
#3/#4 footer branding: Footer.tsx:86-96 = <Link aria-label='Fractal — back to home' style=Jacquard 24>Fractal</Link>; no .italic class anywhere on it. Retargeted to the semantic aria-label selector; both still assert the Jacquard 'Fractal' wordmark (FRAC-88 intent preserved).
#5 nav escaping (CRITICAL): fixed JS escape .lg\:hidden -> .lg\:hidden. PC-ABSENCE VERIFIED at source: houses.ts:298 Political Club hideFromNavbar:true -> route in NAVBAR_HIDDEN_ROUTES (358-360) -> filtered out of visibleSectionLinks (Navbar.tsx:37-40) -> 'PC' never renders in the mobile row (line 233 iterates visibleSectionLinks). So .not.toContain('PC') is a genuine pass, NOT a masked regression. Abbreviation intent still tested via .toContain('E') (Education->E, line 247).
#6 ol centering: NeighborhoodPage.tsx:61 note wrapper max-w-xl mx-auto; :68 flex justify-center wraps the <ol>. Scoped selector .max-w-xl .flex.justify-center correctly targets the note and still requires the ol child.
#7 layout: NeighborhoodPage.tsx:32 = min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-start (top-aligned). Selector matches exact current class set; still verifies full-viewport flex column.

Gates: pnpm test 155 passed / 0 failed (10 files). typecheck clean. build OK. conformance passes (no net-new off-vocab colors).

Acceptance criteria all met. Each fix faithfully retargets the same intent against current correct DOM; no toBeTruthy-only stubs, no deleted assertions, no source edits. Ready for done.
